summary: Iteration 18 - Tax Calculator and Tax-Related APIs Testing. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). All tax endpoints working correctly including /api/tax-calculator (Old/New Regime), /api/tax-summary, /api/capital-gains, and CRUD for /api/user-tax-deductions.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped - React Native (Expo) app cannot be tested via browser. Per instructions, backend-only testing performed.

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native app (skipped per instructions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All tax-related APIs tested and working. Tax Calculator returns correct data for both Old and New Regime (Budget 2025). Demo user has salary income ~₹220,000, total gross ~₹307,000, STCG ~₹25,000 from stock sale, and ₹100,000 in 80C deductions.

details: FY 2024-25 and FY 2023-24 also work correctly
Old Regime: Standard deduction ₹50,000, Chapter VI-A deductions included
New Regime: Standard deduction ₹75,000 (Budget 2025), limited NPS deduction
Tax slabs breakdown included for both regimes
Capital gains tax added to total tax in both regimes
Comparison shows better_regime (old/new/equal) with savings amount
Each section shows limit, used, remaining, percentage
Tax saved estimates for 20% and 30% slabs
GET /api/capital-gains returns gains list with details
Summary includes total STCG, LTCG, exemptions, tax estimates
STCG on equity: 20%, LTCG on equity: 12.5%
Demo user has ₹25,000 STCG from Reliance stock sale

api_test_results.tax_calculator_2025_26: PASS - Returns complete tax calculation with Old/New regime
api_test_results.tax_summary: PASS - Returns sections with limits and usage
api_test_results.capital_gains: PASS - Returns gains with STCG/LTCG breakdown

mocked_apis: None - all APIs are real implementations
